name: WeightProgressChart
description: Line chart card showing weight over time with 1W/1M/All toggle filters

name: WeightToggleChip
description: Time range filter chip for chart (1 week, 1 month, all)

name: LatestEntryCard
description: Card showing today's weight entry with delta indicator

name: WeightDeltaIndicator
description: Delta badge showing weight change with color-coded arrow (up/down/flat)

name: NutritionTipsCard
description: Card with week badge showing stage-specific nutrition tips

name: TipListItem
description: Single nutrition tip with blush dot and text

name: WeightLogList
description: Scrollable list of weight entries with date, value, and optional note

name: WeightLogItem
description: Single weight log entry card with time badge

name: AddWeightSheet
description: Bottom sheet form for adding new weight entries

name: WeightInputField
description: Numeric text field for weight input with unit suffix

name: DatePickerField
description: Tap-to-open date picker field showing selected date

name: NotesInputField
description: Multi-line text field for optional notes

name: EntryDetailSheet
description: Bottom sheet for viewing, editing, or deleting existing weight entries
